ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the boat is based */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of anglers the boat can accommodate */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of boat (e.g., sportfishing, luxury) */,
  "year_manufactured" INTEGER /* Year the boat was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the boat */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain assigned to the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat operating the trip */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of trip (e.g., 3/4 Day, Full Day) */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the trip */,
  "return_time" TEXT /* Return time of the trip */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the trip */,
  "max_angers" INTEGER /* Maximum number of anglers for the trip */,
  "min_angers" INTEGER /* Minimum number of anglers required to run the trip */,
  "trip_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trip */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip being booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "number_of_angers" INTEGER /* Number of anglers in the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "booked_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats booked out of the total capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_bookings_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishing_expeditions" (
  "expedition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expedition */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip that the expedition belongs to */,
  "expedition_date" TEXT /* Date the expedition took place */,
  "num_rod" INTEGER /* Number of rods used during the expedition */,
  "num_fish_caught" INTEGER /* Number of fish caught during the expedition */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain on the expedition */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the expedition */,
  "water_conditions" TEXT /* Water conditions during the expedition */,
  "fishing_location" TEXT /* Location of the expedition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expedition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_expeditions_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fishing_expeditions_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fish_caught" (
  "catch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catch */,
  "expedition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expedition that the catch belongs to */,
  "fish_type" TEXT /* Type of fish caught */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the fish caught */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the fish caught */,
  "angler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the angler who caught the fish */,
  "catch_time" TEXT /* Time the fish was caught */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used to catch the fish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_caught_expedition_id FOREIGN KEY ("expedition_id") REFERENCES fishing_expeditions ("expedition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_caught_angler_id FOREIGN KEY ("angler_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat that the maintenance record belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boat_maintenance_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat that the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "specification_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification */,
  "specification_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boat_specifications_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_types" (
  "trip_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip type */,
  "trip_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trip type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in hours */,
  "max_angers" INTEGER /* Maximum number of anglers for the trip type */,
  "min_angers" INTEGER /* Minimum number of anglers required for the trip type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "trip_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip type that the price belongs to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the trip */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price becomes effective */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_trip_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_type_id") REFERENCES trip_types ("trip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking that the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES trip_bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "gateway_url" TEXT /* URL of the payment gateway */,
  "gateway_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment gateway (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking that the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking confirmation, trip reminder) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES trip_bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, captain) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
